rationale.R1.6: The output improves the readability and flow of the text without introducing any cosmetic issues.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty is appropriately disclosed in several places, but not all hedges are marked explicitly.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed scope with no drift or additional claims.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors or harmful content were introduced, and minor rephrasing does not introduce regressions.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated in the notes provided.
